failure.assessment: Empty tmpfs at /etc/postgresql-custom is writable but hides the image-baked include files required by postgresql.conf. pgsodium_root.key is not present in the image and must be created at runtime into a directory that also retains those includes.
failure.recovery: Preserve container, network, and data volume. Obtain a new exact HCP-04 amendment that provides a writable /etc/postgresql-custom containing the image default config files (for example a disposable named volume seeded once by copying image directory contents without reading secret values), then recreate Postgres and resume health/T054 checks.

result.next_required_action: Exact new HCP-04 approval for seeded writable /etc/postgresql-custom (not an empty tmpfs overlay)
